text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One early morning at summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzz... Bzzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing my phone vibrate, I take a look at the
screen and answer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh! Morning, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for ringing so early! I'm glad you're up,
though.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Could you come out with me for a little while? I'd
like to talk to you about something.

Seiun Sky ends up leading me to the beach. It's
still quite early, so no one else is around.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: No, get over that already. This is a secret tactical meeting! You do wanna come up with a strategy for the Kikuka Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hellooo? Would you quit giving me the cold
shoulder?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I get it. It's not like me to call a tactical
meeting.
choice_data_list: So why set one up all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...I really ran as hard as I could at the Satsuki Sho
and the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I feel like if things keep going the way they
are, I'm gonna hit my peak.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Nobody ever really expected a lot from
me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm not getting all heavy or anything. I just
mean I've always been the "what you see is what
you get" type. Take a look.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Is my adorable daintiness not getting
across?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
My point is... foisting all your expectations on a
cutesy Umamusume like me is so cruel!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It was the same with Gramps. He kept praising me
and saying I have what it takes to win the
Classics.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So I came to Tracen and made my debut, but
every day I'm surprised by all the things I'm
lacking.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any kind of innate agility, or the
competitive spirit to seize opportunities.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The stuff I don't have, that I can't have... I see all of them in everyone around me... Even so, I haven't maxed out my potential yet.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if all the people who've known me since I
was little are super surprised right now.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I don't have what it takes, but here I am,
competing against racers with real talent.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Still, there has to be a limit to that. There's only
so much I can improve, and there's no closing the
gap between my natural aptitude and theirs.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Spe and the others all believe that, by the end of
summer, they'll be better than they were at the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...And I think they're right. If we faced off against
each other seriously, I wouldn't be able to win.
choice_data_list: So what are you going to do?
So what are you going to do?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What I'm gonna do... is run away from the fight. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't stand a chance against them directly!
I'd just fall behind and get hopelessly trounced.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So... I won't race like they do. I'll force them to run at my pace instead.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And then everyone will be like, "Whoa! When did
Seiun Sky reach the winner's circle?!"

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You know, if I can get them to say something like
that, it'll mean I pulled it off.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Flying ahead with high speed or pushing forward
on raw power are cool and all, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
My greatest ally is my smarts. I can control time
itself when I put my mind to it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haha! My talent? No way. Distractions, ploys, and traps are all just tricks.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But a well-laid trap actually gets results. For me,
that's the only path to victory.

"Run from the fight, win the race." She can scope
out a shot at victory by racing in a way that's all
her own. That's a strength no other racer's got.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All that's to say... I'm gonna need your brains.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You don't have any training methods on how to
smoothly hijack a race, do ya?

It's a reckless request, but if this is the Kikuka Sho
we're talking about, then I do have some ideas.
choice_data_list:
Strategy training to prepare for the third-corner
hill.

Perseverance training to pull ahead in the last
stretch.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oho... You're right. Conquering that hill at Kyoto
Racecourse could be the key.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But don't make me go running up any
hundred-step shrine stairs! ...Okay?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm serious! I won't do it!

Seiun Sky keeps spouting similar protests but
trains diligently all the same.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh? Over there, is that... Sky?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe it. Since when did she start doing
early morning sessions?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So, both Special Week and Sky seem to be
improving...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: As one of the big three, I won't be left behind.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Perseverance... Sounds tough. But I guess pushing
through in the final, final stretch really is
important.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But I can train for that by persevering away from practice, riiight? ...Wrong?

Seiun Sky continues spouting similar protests, but
trains diligently all the same.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh? Over there, is that... Sky?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe it. Since when did she start doing
early morning sessions?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So, both Special Week and Sky seem to be
improving...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: As one of the big three, I won't be left behind.
